CustomField.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for a response from the address verification service before the callout times out. Salesforce enforces a maximum of 120 seconds for HTTP callouts. Increase this value if the verification service is slow to respond; decrease it if you want faster failure detection.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Seconds to wait for the address verification service to respond before timing out. Maximum is 120 seconds.
CustomField.label: Timeout
